name: vtsSetPWMStartDelay
title: vtsSetPWMStartDelay
description: Specifies a delay for the start of a curve stimulation or PWM stimulation. This function is supported by the modules VT2004 and VT2848.

parameters.name: Target
parameters.description: Name of the system variable/namespace that will be affected by this function call.

description: In the following example the PWM output of two VT2004 channels is simulating two sensors with PWM output. The SetPWMStartDelay command ensures that the PWM output on channel Sensor2 is starting 2ms later to produce the corresponding phase shift.
